stemHtml: When a generator is running, the indication on the left-zero ammeter shows (1) _____ and the centre-zero ammeter shows (2) _____. If the generator fails, the left-zero ammeter shows (3) _____ and the centre-zero ammeter shows (4) _____.

options.a: (1) Generator load; (2) Battery charge; (3) Zero; (4) Battery discharge
options.b: (1) Battery voltage; (2) Generator load; (3) Full-scale deflection; (4) Battery charge
options.c: (1) Battery charge only; (2) Generator output; (3) Negative deflection; (4) No battery flow
options.d: (1) Generator load; (2) No indication; (3) Zero; (4) Zero
